stories.headline: US strikes around Tehran for first time in most recent wave of attacks, says Iranian state media
stories.summary: The US says it fired a missile into a Curaçao-flagged oil tanker's funnel after claiming the ship, which was sailing toward Kharg Island, Iran's main oil export terminal in the Persian Gulf, "ignored multiple warnings".

stories.headline: Wheat Holds Near Two-Month High After Black Sea Attacks
stories.summary: Wheat futures held gains after jumping 5% on Wednesday, as Ukrainian and Russian strikes in the Black Sea threatened a key export route for the warring countries.

stories.headline: India Raises Export Levies on Diesel and Jet Fuel
stories.summary: India increased taxes on exports of ‌diesel and aviation turbine fuel as the collapse of the US-Iran interim peace deal and renewed hostilities have choked oil flows again tightening global fuel markets.

stories.summary: Syngenta Group’s planned $5 billion Hong Kong initial public offering is facing delays as the seed and pesticide company waits for better conditions in the agriculture sector, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: China Seeks to Curb New Bond Sales by LGFVs With Increased Debt
stories.summary: A major Chinese bond regulator is taking fresh steps to curb debt sales by the nation’s municipal borrowers, according to people familiar with the matter, adding pressure on weaker issuers looking to refinance notes.

stories.summary: South Korea will soon announce measures regarding the leveraged exchange-traded funds tied to shares of Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. that have fueled a surge in market volatility.

stories.headline: Zelenskyy dismisses Ukraine’s popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov
stories.summary: “It was a great honour to serve the Ukrainian people as defence minister," Fedorov said on Wednesday evening, confirming his dismissal amid Zelenskyy’s government reshuffle. While not a very public figure, Fedorov has been widely praised within the military and among civil society.

stories.headline: Ukraine: Six dead as Russia targets Sumy and Odesa

stories.headline: French parliament passes assisted dying bill for some terminally ill adults
stories.summary: After years of debate, French MPs have voted to adopt a bill to establish a right to assisted dying for some adults suffering from an incurable condition.

stories.headline: How scientists forecast heatwaves
